column.name: title
column.value: The busker who turned a subway corner into a concert hall

column.name: summary
column.value:
Every evening at six, the tiled corner where two tunnels meet fills with the sound of a cello. Commuters who normally never break stride stop, set down their bags, and stay.
He has played the same spot for three years, and the acoustics — an accident of curved tile and low ceiling — have made it a small institution. Regulars know the routine; strangers film it and leave more than they meant to.
The transport authority once tried to move him on. A petition with four thousand names changed their mind, and now there is a small brass plaque on the wall marking the spot as an official pitch.

column.name: support_question
column.value: Should cities protect established street-performance spots?

column.name: case_for
column.value: Great pitches build culture and community that's worth safeguarding.

column.name: case_against
column.value: Fixed rights to public space invite disputes and shut newcomers out.

column.name: title
column.value: Sixty seconds with the dawn swimmers who never miss a day

column.name: summary
column.value:
It is four degrees and barely light, and a dozen people are wading into the harbour as if it were the most natural thing in the world. Some have done this every morning for a decade.
They talk about it less as exercise than as medicine — for anxiety, for grief, for the flat grey months. The science on cold water is still thin, but the group is not waiting for a trial to tell them how they feel.
What started as three friends is now a roster of eighty, with a rule that has never been written down but everyone obeys: whoever gets there first waits for whoever comes last.

column.name: support_question
column.value: Should councils provide safe open-water swimming spots?

column.name: case_for
column.value: Safe access spreads a proven boost to physical and mental health.

column.name: case_against
column.value: Councils take on liability and lifeguard costs for a risky activity.
